bullets: Helps installers manage work orders (install, remove, switch billboards).
Uploads proof of job completion from the field.
Designed, built, managed, and deployed the app independently.
Used across 4 countries · Adopted by 6 client companies.

Led sprint planning and technical decision-making.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: Hi, I’m Joskua — a freelance developer based in Mexico City. I believe that technology should make life easier, smarter, and more human.
about.description2: Over the past 5+ years, I’ve worked with teams across the US, Mexico, Central America and Asia, building real-world systems that power loyalty programs, optimize business processes, and bring ideas to life.
about.description3: I’ve led development teams, launched cross-platform apps, and integrated solutions with POS systems and payment platforms — always with a focus on clean code, usability, and impact.
about.languages: Languages I speak fluently: Spanish, English, French

painPoints.title: Your business does not need more manual work. It needs systems.
painPoints.intro: When operations depend on scattered messages, spreadsheets, and late replies, growth becomes more expensive than it should be.

items.title: Leads go cold because replies are slow
items.description: When you answer hours later, many prospects have already compared, hesitated, or bought from someone else.

items.title: A digital presence that does not build trust
items.description: An old, slow, or unclear site makes a serious company feel improvised on mobile.

items.title: Processes stuck in paper and manual entry
items.description: Every repeated manual task increases errors, rework, and dependency on key people.

services.title: Technology focused on concrete business outcomes.
services.intro: Each project starts with a commercial or operational priority, then uses the right solution instead of a rigid package.

items.title: Digital Sales
items.description: Professional websites and e-commerce that clarify your offer, build trust, and make it easier to buy or get in touch.

items.title: Intelligent Customer Service
items.description: WhatsApp and customer-service automation that answers questions, guides prospects, and makes follow-up more consistent.

items.title: Operational Efficiency
items.description: Integrations, internal tools, and process automation that reduce repeated data entry, errors, and manual work.

midCta.title: Let us identify where technology can create the most value.
midCta.description: In a short WhatsApp conversation, we review your context, the main point of friction, and the opportunity worth prioritizing.

portfolio.title: Results built with speed and technical judgment.
portfolio.intro: Projects where the priority was solving a concrete commercial problem, not just delivering a pretty screen.

process.title: A clear path from opportunity to adoption.
process.intro: Scope and pace adjust to the project while priorities and decisions remain visible throughout.

items.title: Diagnosis
items.description: We understand the business, the problem, and the highest-value opportunity.

items.title: Proposal and priorities
items.description: We define scope, work order, estimated timing, and success criteria.

items.title: Build and integration
items.description: We develop, connect, and validate the solution against real operations.

items.title: Launch and guidance
items.description: We put the system into use, support adoption, and agree on any ongoing support.

about.title: From international technology leadership to strategic ally for Mexican businesses.
about.description: After leading and building technology for teams across countries, I now focus that experience on helping Mexican SMBs scale through practical engineering: clear systems, useful automation, and technical decisions connected to the business.
about.imageAlt: Technology consultant collaborating with Mexican small-business owners on digital solutions

faq.title: No unnecessary technical jargon.

items.question: How much does it cost to digitize my business?
items.answer: It depends on the scope. First we diagnose which problem is worth solving, then define a staged proposal so investment goes where it can create the most return.

items.question: How long does it take to see results?
items.answer: Some solutions can launch in days, such as a landing page or base e-commerce store, while deeper integrations and automations can take weeks.

items.question: I am not technical. Will I be able to use it?
items.answer: Yes. The solution should adapt to your operation, not the other way around. Delivery includes clarity, guidance, and decisions designed for real people.

items.question: Will my business own the delivered system?
items.answer: Ownership and access are made explicit in the proposal. As a working principle, the agreed deliverables and project accounts remain under the client's control once delivery and the corresponding payments are complete.

items.question: What happens after launch?
items.answer: The engagement includes launch and the agreed handoff support. If you need maintenance, improvements, or ongoing support, that is scoped separately based on your operation and required service level.

items.question: Can you integrate with the systems we already use?
items.answer: In many cases, yes. I first review available APIs, access, data quality, and technical constraints to confirm what is feasible and which risks need to be considered.

faq.finalTitle: Let us turn your operation into a competitive advantage.
faq.finalIntro: Start with a short conversation to identify the highest-value opportunity across sales, customer service, or operations.
